title: RelitoFault 16x
description: This is a pvp texture pack, it has both normal and katana sword textures. The texture changes are wool, blocks, armor, swords, tools, and skies.
body:
# **Description**
This is RelitoFault 16x, a texture pack made for RelitoPlaysCg. It is made by [TheMantikorMc](https://twitter.com/TheMantikormc) and [RiyuPacks](https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCcPe_fLvbeWVPbSFmk93Eww). The pack consists of swords, tools, armor, blocks, and skies.

# **Features**
- 🪖 Armor
- ⚔️ Swords
- ⛏️ Tools
- 🔲 Blocks
- ☁️ Skies

# **Bedrock Version Download**
- [Katana Sword Version](https://www.mediafire.com/file/hf89h888ilgt68v/RelitoFault_16x_Katana_Swords_16x.mcpack/file) - [Normal Sword Version](https://www.mediafire.com/file/f9acl57l52rbk3u/RelitoFault_16x__Normal_Swords.mcpack/file)

# **Pack Creators**
- [TheMantikorMc](https://twitter.com/TheMantikormc)
- [RiyuPacks](https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCcPe_fLvbeWVPbSFmk93Eww)

# **Pack Showcase Video**
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/mUwEMMxJuG0" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
